items.title: Consumer Tech News (Nov 17-21): U.S. Jobs Surge in September, Trump Considers Delaying Semiconductor Tariffs & More
items.description: U.S. labor market rebounds in September, boosting growth optimism and raising questions over a potential Federal Reserve rate cut in December. Trump administration considers delaying semiconductor tariffs, signaling a major policy shift for U.S. tech imports and global supply chains.

items.title: Microsoft faces uphill climb to turn enterprise dominance into widespread AI chatbot adoption
items.description: At Microsoft's annual Ignite conference this week, IT buyers explained why Microsoft isn't seeing runaway success with its Copilot AI assistant.
